hydroPSO 0.5-40
  • Reference
    • Tutorial for using `hydroPSO` to calibrate the `GR4J` hydrological model
    • Tutorial for using `hydroPSO` to calibrate `TUWmodel`
  • Changelog

Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Mauricio Zambrano-Bigiarini. Author, maintainer.

  • Rodrigo Rojas. Contributor.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Zambrano-Bigiarini, M.; R. Rojas (2013), A model-independent Particle Swarm Optimisation software for model calibration, Environmental Modelling & Software, 43, 5-25, doi:10.1016/j.envsoft.2013.01.004

@Article{Zambrano-BigiariniRojas2013-hydroPSO_article,
  title = {A model-independent Particle Swarm Optimisation software for model calibration},
  journal = {Environmental Modelling & Software},
  author = {{Zambrano-Bigiarini} and {M.} and {Rojas} and {R.}},
  volume = {43},
  pages = {5-25},
  year = {2013},
  doi = {10.1016/j.envsoft.2013.01.004},
  url = {http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.envsoft.2013.01.004},
}

Zambrano-Bigiarini, M. and Rojas, R.(). hydroPSO: Particle Swarm Optimisation, with Focus on Environmental Models. R package version 0.5-40. URL:https://cran.r-project.org/package=hydroPSO. doi:10.32614/CRAN.package.hydroPSO.

@Manual{Zambrano-BigiariniRojas-hydroPSO_pkg,
  title = {hydroPSO: Particle Swarm Optimisation, with Focus on Environmental Models},
